posDesktop.label: POS Desktop
posDesktop.description: The default desktop POS UI shipping today. /sales, /inventory, /dashboard, etc.

posTouch.label: POS Touch
posTouch.description: Touch-optimized layout for tablets — wider buttons, bigger fonts, sticky bottom action bar.

kds.label: KDS — Kitchen Display Screen
kds.description: Fullscreen ticket queue for kitchen staff. No sidebar, no header — designed for a kitchen-mounted TV.

customerDisplay.label: Customer Display
customerDisplay.description: Second-monitor cart mirror — shows the cashier's cart to the customer in real time.

mobileWaiter.label: Mobile Waiter
mobileWaiter.description: Phone-width layout for waitstaff taking orders at the table.
